                def merge
          
      52.

                  @book = Book.find(params[:id])

    56. 
            

            

                def do_merge
          
      57. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    57. 
            

            

                  @source_book = Book.find(params[:id])
          
      58. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    58. 
            

            

                  @target_book = Book.find(params[:target_id])
          
      59.

    60. 
            

            

                  ActiveRecord::Base.transaction do
          
      61. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    61. 
            

            

                    @source_book.likes.update_all(likeable_id: @target_book.id)
          
      62. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    62. 
            

            

                    @source_book.comments.update_all(commentable_id: @target_book.id)
          
      63. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    63. 
            

            

                    LibraryItem.where(item: @source_book).update_all(item_id: @target_book.id)
          
      64. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    64. 
            

            

                    @source_book.destroy!
          
      65. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    65. 
            

            

                  end

    66. 
            

            

            
          
      67. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    67.

      68.

                end

              def added_description(user_link, trackable, trackable_link)

              2

              2

      35. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    35. 
            

            

                when 'Movie'
          
      36. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    36. 
            
              1
            

            

                  "#{user_link} added movie '#{trackable_link}' to their collection"

      41.

              def consumed_verb(klass_name)
          
      122. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    122. 
            

            

                case klass_name
          
      123. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    123. 
            

            

                when 'Movie', 'TvShow', 'TvEpisode' then 'watched'
          
      124. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    124. 
            

            

                when 'VideoGame' then 'played'
          
      125. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    125. 
            

            

                when 'Album' then 'listened to'
          
      126. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    126. 
            

            

                when 'Comic' then 'read'
          
      127. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    127.

              def find_or_create_movie(row)

    157. 
            

            

                title = row['Name']

    158. 
            

            

                year = row['Year']&.to_i
          
      159. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    159. 
            

            

                return nil if title.blank?
          
      160. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    160. 
            

            

            
          
      161. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    161. 
            

            

                movie = Movie.find_by(title: title, release_year: year)

    162. 
            

            

                return movie if movie

                if wiki_data

    169. 
            

            

                  movie.thumbnail_url = wiki_data[:thumbnail_url]

    170. 
            

            

                  movie.director = wiki_data[:director] || 'Various'

              def fetch_movie_from_wikipedia(title, year)
          
      184. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    184. 
            

            

                search_query = year ? "#{title} #{year} film" : "#{title} film"
          
      185. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    185. 
            

            

                search_url = "https://en.wikipedia.org/w/api.php?action=query&list=search&srsearch=#{CGI.escape(search_query)}&format=json&origin=*"
          
      186. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    186. 
            

            

                uri = URI(search_url)
          
      187. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    187. 
            

            

                response = Net::HTTP.get(uri)
          
      188. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    188. 
            

            

                data = JSON.parse(response)
          
      189. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    189. 
            

            

                search_results = data.dig('query', 'search') || []
          
      190. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    190. 
            

            

            
          
      191. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    191. 
            

            

                result = search_results.first
          
      192. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    192. 
            

            

                return nil unless result
          
      193. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    193. 
            

            

            
          
      194. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    194. 
            

            

                page_title = result['title']
          
      195. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    195. 
            

            

                summary_url = "https://en.wikipedia.org/api/rest_v1/page/summary/#{CGI.escape(page_title.gsub(' ', '_'))}"
          
      196. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    196. 
            

            

                sum_response = Net::HTTP.get(URI(summary_url))
          
      197. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    197. 
            

            

                sum_data = begin
          
      198. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    198.

              def interpolate_social_template(template, activity_type)
          
      146. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    146. 
            

            

                msg = template.dup
          
      147. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    147. 
            

            

                msg.gsub!('[title]', title.to_s) if msg.include?('[title]')
          
      148. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    148. 
            

            

                msg.gsub!('[rating]', rating.to_s.presence || 'Unrated') if respond_to?(:rating) && msg.include?('[rating]')
          
      149. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    149. 
            

            

                msg.gsub!('[review]', review.to_s.presence || '') if respond_to?(:review) && msg.include?('[review]')
          
      150. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    150. 
            

            

                msg.gsub!('[type]', activity_type.to_s) if msg.include?('[type]')
          
      151. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    151. 
            

            

                if msg.include?('[link]')
          
      152. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    152. 
            

            

                  host = ENV.fetch('HOST', 'https://trove.schweg.xyz')
          
      153. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    153. 
            

            

                  target = respond_to?(:item) ? item : self
          
      154. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    154. 
            

            

                  begin
          
      155. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    155. 
            

            

                    link = Rails.application.routes.url_helpers.polymorphic_url(target, host: host)
          
      156. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    156. 
            

            

                    msg.gsub!('[link]', link)
          
      157. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    157. 
            

            

                  rescue StandardError
          
      158. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    158. 
            

            

                    msg.gsub!('[link]', '').strip!
          
      159. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    159. 
            

            

                  end
          
      160. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    160. 
            

            

                end
          
      161. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    161. 
            

            

                msg.gsub('  ', ' ').strip
          
      162. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    162.

    163.

                director = crew.find { |c| c['job'] == 'Director' }

      120.

      236.

      237.

              def parse_comicvine_results(data)

    247.

      248. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    248. 
            

            

                    release_year: item['start_year'],
          
      249. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    249. 
            

            

                    thumbnail_url: item.dig('image', 'original_url') || item.dig('image', 'medium_url'),
          
      250. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    250. 
            

            

                    api_id: item['id']&.to_s,
          
      251. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    251. 
            

            

                    external_url: item['site_detail_url'],
          
      252. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    252.

      253. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    253.

      269.

              def map_tvmaze_show(show)
          
      305. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    305. 
            

            

                network_name = if show['network']
          
      306. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    306. 
            

            

                                 show['network']['name']
          
      307. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    307. 
            

            

                               elsif show['webChannel']
          
      308. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    308. 
            

            

                                 show['webChannel']['name']
          
      309. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    309. 
            

            

                               end
          
      310. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    310. 
            

            

            
          
      311. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    311. 
            

            

                {
          
      312. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    312. 
            

            

                  title: show['name'],
          
      313. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    313. 
            

            

                  network: network_name,
          
      314. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    314. 
            

            

                  release_year: show['premiered']&.split('-')&.first,
          
      315. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    315. 
            

            

                  thumbnail_url: show['image'] ? (show['image']['original'] || show['image']['medium']) : nil,
          
      316. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    316. 
            

            

                  api_id: show['id'].to_s,
          
      317. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    317. 
            

            

                  external_url: show['officialSite'] || show['url'],
          
      318. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    318. 
            

            

                  is_local: false
          
      319. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    319. 
            

            

                }
          
      320. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    320. 
            

            

              end
          
      321.

      322. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    322.

              def fetch_steam_video_games(query)
          
      326. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    326. 
            
              1
            

            

                return [] if Rails.env.test?
          
      327. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    327. 
            

            

            
          
      328. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    328. 
            

            

                begin
          
      329. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    329. 
            

            

                  uri = URI("https://store.steampowered.com/api/storesearch/?term=#{CGI.escape(query)}&l=english&cc=US")
          
      330. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    330. 
            

            

                  response = Net::HTTP.get(uri)
          
      331. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    331. 
            

            

                  data = JSON.parse(response)
          
      332. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    332. 
            

            

                  return [] unless data && data['items']
          
      333. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    333. 
            

            

            
          
      334. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    334. 
            

            

                  data['items'].slice(0, 5).map do |item|
          
      335. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    335. 
            

            

                    Thread.new do
          
      336. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    336. 
            

            

                      app_id = item['id']
          
      337. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    337. 
            

            

                      platforms = []
          
      338. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    338. 
            

            

                      if item['platforms']
          
      339. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    339. 
            

            

                        platforms << 'PC' if item['platforms']['windows']
          
      340. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    340. 
            

            

                        platforms << 'Mac' if item['platforms']['mac']
          
      341. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    341. 
            

            

                        platforms << 'Linux' if item['platforms']['linux']
          
      342. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    342. 
            

            

                      end
          
      343. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    343. 
            

            

            
          
      344. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    344. 
            

            

                      # Fetch additional details for developer and publisher
          
      345. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    345. 
            

            

                      developer = ''
          
      346. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    346. 
            

            

                      publisher = ''
          
      347. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    347. 
            

            

                      release_year = nil
          
      348. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    348. 
            

            

                      begin
          
      349. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    349. 
            

            

                        details_uri = URI("https://store.steampowered.com/api/appdetails?appids=#{app_id}")
          
      350. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    350. 
            

            

                        details_res = Net::HTTP.get(details_uri)
          
      351. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    351. 
            

            

                        app_data = JSON.parse(details_res).dig(app_id.to_s, 'data') || {}
          
      352. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    352. 
            

            

                        developer = app_data['developers']&.first || ''
          
      353. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    353. 
            

            

                        publisher = app_data['publishers']&.first || ''
          
      354. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    354. 
            

            

                        date_str = app_data.dig('release_date', 'date')
          
      355. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    355. 
            

            

                        release_year = date_str ? date_str.split(',').last&.strip : nil
          
      356. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    356. 
            

            

                      rescue StandardError
          
      357. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    357. 
            

            

                        # Silently ignore details failure and fallback to empty
          
      358. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    358. 
            

            

                      end
          
      359. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    359. 
            

            

            
          
      360. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    360. 
            

            

                      {
          
      361. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    361. 
            

            

                        title: item['name'],
          
      362. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    362. 
            

            

                        developer: developer,
          
      363. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    363. 
            

            

                        publisher: publisher,
          
      364. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    364. 
            

            

                        platform: platforms.join(', '),
          
      365. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    365. 
            

            

                        release_year: release_year,
          
      366. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    366. 
            

            

                        thumbnail_url: "https://shared.cloudflare.steamstatic.com/store_item_assets/steam/apps/#{app_id}/library_600x900.jpg",
          
      367. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    367. 
            

            

                        api_id: "steam_#{app_id}",
          
      368. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    368. 
            

            

                        external_url: "https://store.steampowered.com/app/#{app_id}",
          
      369. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    369. 
            

            

                        is_local: false
          
      370. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    370. 
            

            

                      }
          
      371. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    371. 
            

            

                    end
          
      372. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    372. 
            

            

                  end.map(&:value)
          
      373. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    373. 
            

            

                rescue StandardError => e
          
      374. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    374. 
            

            

                  Rails.logger.error "Steam Store Search error: #{e.message}"
          
      375. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    375. 
            

            

                  []
          
      376. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    376. 
            

            

                end
          
      377. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    377. 
            

            

              end
          
      378. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    378. 
            

            

            
          
      379. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    379. 
            
              1
            

            

              def fetch_rawg_video_games(query)
          
      380. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    380. 
            
              1
            

            

                return [] if Rails.env.test?
          
      381. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    381. 
            

            

            
          
      382. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    382. 
            

            

                api_key = ApiConfiguration.find_by(source_name: 'RAWG', is_active: true)&.access_token
          
      383.

                return [] unless api_key
          
      384.

      385. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    385. 
            

            

                url = URI("https://api.rawg.io/api/games?search=#{CGI.escape(query)}&key=#{api_key}")
          
      386. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    386. 
            

            

                response = Net::HTTP.get(url)
          
      387.

                data = JSON.parse(response)
          
      388. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    388. 
            

            

            
          
      389. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    389. 
            

            

                return [] unless data['results']
          
      390. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    390. 
            

            

            
          
      391. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    391. 
            

            

                results = data['results'].slice(0, 5).map do |item|
          
      392. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    392. 
            

            

                  {
          
      393.

                    title: item['name'],

    395.

      396. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    396. 
            

            

                    platform: item['platforms']&.map { |p| p.dig('platform', 'name') }&.join(', '),
          
      397. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    397. 
            

            

                    release_year: item['released']&.split('-')&.first,
          
      398. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    398. 
            

            

                    thumbnail_url: item['background_image'],
          
      399. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    399. 
            

            

                    api_id: "rawg_#{item['id']}",
          
      400. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    400. 
            

            

                    external_url: "https://rawg.io/games/#{item['slug']}",
          
      401. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    401. 
            

            

                    is_local: false
          
      402. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    402. 
            

            

                  }
          
      403. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    403. 
            

            

                end
          
      404. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    404. 
            

            

                results.select { |r| r[:thumbnail_url] }
          
      405. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    405. 
            

            

              rescue StandardError => e

    406. 
            

            

                Rails.logger.error "RAWG search failed: #{e.message}"
          
      407. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    407. 
            

            

                []
          
      408. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    408.

              # rubocop:enable Metrics/AbcSize, Metrics/CyclomaticComplexity, Metrics/MethodLength, Metrics/PerceivedComplexity

    411. 
            
              1
            

            

              def query_wikipedia_video_games(query)
          
      412. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    412. 
            

            

                search_url = 'https://en.wikipedia.org/w/api.php?action=query&list=search&srsearch=' \
          
      413. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    413. 
            

            

                             "#{CGI.escape("#{query} video game")}&format=json&origin=*"
          
      414. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    414. 
            

            

                uri = URI(search_url)
          
      415. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    415. 
            

            

                response = Net::HTTP.get(uri)
          
      416. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    416. 
            

            

                data = JSON.parse(response)
          
      417. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    417. 
            

            

                search_results = data.dig('query', 'search') || []
          
      418. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    418. 
            

            

            
          
      419. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    419. 
            

            

                search_results.first(3).map { |result| parse_wikipedia_game(result) }.compact
          
      420. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    420. 
            

            

              rescue StandardError => e
          
      421. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    421. 
            

            

                Rails.logger.error "Wikipedia video game search failed: #{e.message}"
          
      422. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    422. 
            

            

                []
          
      423. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    423. 
            

            

              end
          
      424. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    424. 
            

            

            
          
      425. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    425. 
            
              1
            

            

              def parse_wikipedia_game(result)
          
      426. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    426. 
            

            

                page_title = result['title']
          
      427. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    427. 
            

            

                summary_url = "https://en.wikipedia.org/api/rest_v1/page/summary/#{CGI.escape(page_title.gsub(' ', '_'))}"
          
      428. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    428. 
            

            

                sum_response = Net::HTTP.get(URI(summary_url))
          
      429. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    429. 
            

            

                sum_data = begin
          
      430. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    430. 
            

            

                  JSON.parse(sum_response)
          
      431. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    431. 
            

            

                rescue StandardError
          
      432. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    432. 
            

            

                  {}
          
      433. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    433. 
            

            

                end
          
      434. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    434. 
            

            

            
          
      435. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    435. 
            

            

                return nil unless sum_data['originalimage'] && sum_data['originalimage']['source']
          
      436. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    436. 
            

            

            
          
      437. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    437. 
            

            

                desc = sum_data['description'] || ''
          
      438. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    438. 
            

            

                year_match = desc.match(/\b(19\d\d|20\d\d)\b/)
          
      439. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    439. 
            

            

                release_year = year_match ? year_match[1].to_i : nil
          
      440. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    440. 
            

            

            
          
      441. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    441. 
            

            

                {
          
      442. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    442. 
            

            

                  title: sum_data['title'],
          
      443. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    443. 
            

            

                  developer: 'Nintendo / Various',
          
      444. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    444. 
            

            

                  publisher: '',
          
      445. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    445. 
            

            

                  platform: 'Console / Various',
          
      446. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    446. 
            

            

                  release_year: release_year,
          
      447. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    447. 
            

            

                  thumbnail_url: sum_data['originalimage']['source'],
          
      448. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    448. 
            

            

                  api_id: "wiki_#{sum_data['pageid'] || page_title}",
          
      449. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    449. 
            

            

                  external_url: sum_data.dig('content_urls', 'desktop', 'page'),
          
      450. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    450. 
            

            

                  is_local: false
          
      451. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    451. 
            

            

                }
          
      452. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    452. 
            

            

              end
          
      453. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    453. 
            

            

            
          
      454. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    454. 
            

            

              # --- Books ---
          
      455. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    455. 
            

            

            
          
      456. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    456. 
            
              1
            

            

              def fetch_itunes_books(query)
          
      457. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    457. 
            

            

                return [] if Rails.env.test?

    458. 
            

            

            
          
      459. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    459. 
            

            

                url = URI("https://itunes.apple.com/search?term=#{CGI.escape(query)}&media=ebook&limit=5&country=US")
          
      460. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    460. 
            

            

                response = Net::HTTP.get(url)
          
      461. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    461. 
            

            

                data = JSON.parse(response)
          
      462. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    462. 
            

            

            
          
      463. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    463. 
            

            

                return [] unless data['results']
          
      464. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    464. 
            

            

            
          
      465. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    465. 
            

            

                results = data['results'].map do |item|
          
      466. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    466. 
            

            

                  {
          
      467. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    467. 
            

            

                    title: item['trackName'],
          
      468. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    468. 
            

            

                    author: item['artistName'],
          
      469. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    469.
